ValidationRule.description: Only allow users with the permission set Approve VEX Vouchers to change the VEX Voucher status to an 'Approved' value.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND(ISCHANGED(Vex_Voucher_Status__c) ,
OR(ISPICKVAL( Vex_Voucher_Status__c , 'VEX RAF Higher Approved') , ISPICKVAL( Vex_Voucher_Status__c , 'VEX RIS Higher Approved') , ISPICKVAL( Vex_Voucher_Status__c , 'VEX RAF Lower Approved') , ISPICKVAL( Vex_Voucher_Status__c , 'VEX RIS Lower Approved') )
, NOT($Permission.VEX_Vouchers_Approve)
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You do not have permission to approve vouchers!
